summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The Vanguard FTSE Developed Markets ETF (VEA) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is passively managed to provide exposure to the developed markets ex-US equity space. It holds stocks of any market capitalization. VEA was launched on Jul 20, 2007 and is issued by Vanguard.
infoTable: FTSE Developed ex US All Cap Net Tax (US RIC) Index

holdings.infoBox: VEA is an equity ETF with a total of 3881 individual holdings. The top holdings are Samsung Electronics stock at 3.01%, SK hynix at 2.57%, ASML Holding at 1.91%, Slbbh1142 at 1.29%, and HSBC Holdings at 0.98%.
